report.summary: Evening update: Drafted 3 new social posts (#116-118) covering the House tokenization hearing ($26.48B RWA market, 2 bills introduced), institutional accumulation scorecard (MS MSBT + $2.5B ETF inflows + MicroStrategy 762K BTC), and $26.48B RWA milestone thread. Updated newsletter v23 with tokenization hearing addendum. Created content calendar v29 (11 posts through Mar 28). Built 2 new SVG social cards (tokenization hearing + institutional scorecard divergence meter). Key narrative: Congress legislating tokenization while retail sits at Day 48 Extreme Fear — the institutional/retail divergence is the defining story of March 2026.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #116: Congress Tokenization Hearing — most important hearing to date, 2 bills introduced (Modernizing Markets Through Tokenization Act + Capital Markets Technology Modernization Act), $26.48B RWA market, Blockchain Association CEO testified. CTA to tokenized-real-world-assets-guide (scheduled Thu Mar 26 8AM ET)

Tweet #117: Institutional Accumulation Scorecard — week of Mar 25 summary: MS MSBT filing, $2.5B ETF inflows, MSTR 762K BTC, Bitmine 4.66M ETH, Congress hearing, CLARITY Act. 'The divergence has never been wider.' CTA to whale-tracker (scheduled Thu Mar 26 1PM ET)

Tweet #118: $26.48B RWA On-Chain — breakdown of tokenized asset classes (treasuries, equities, real estate, private credit, commodities), Congress hearing context. CTA to tokenized-real-world-assets-guide (scheduled Fri Mar 28 10AM ET)
Newsletter v23 addendum: Tokenization hearing spotlight section — 2 bills, $26.48B market, Nasdaq approval, legislative scaffolding catching up to market reality
Content calendar v29: 11 posts scheduled Wed Mar 25 through Fri Mar 28 across Twitter, Discord/TG, and Email

sections.title: Growth Trajectory Analysis
items: BREAKOUT: Tokenized RWA content — Congress holding dedicated hearing, $26.48B market, 2 bills introduced, Nasdaq approval. This is the freshest high-impact narrative. Our guide is positioned for massive search volume growth.
PEAK: Fear & Greed content — 48-day record. Every day the streak continues, we own the 'extreme fear' search narrative. Unique competitive advantage.
SURGING: Bitcoin ETF coverage — MSBT filing + $2.5B March inflows. 'Morgan Stanley bitcoin ETF' is a brand-new search query we should dominate.
STRONG: Institutional accumulation theme — the retail fear vs. institutional buying divergence is the meta-narrative of March 2026. Our whale tracker + ETF guides are perfectly positioned.
TIME-SENSITIVE: Tax guides — 21 days until April 15 deadline. Peak search volume window is NOW.
EMERGING: Onchain credit scoring, ERC-8183 agentic commerce — early-mover content with zero competition. Will compound over weeks.
BLOCKED: 160+ pages stuck behind git lock (ongoing). Every day undeployed = lost indexing momentum for queued content.
